results.title: Govinda Responds to Viral Videos Involving Wife Sunita Ahuja
results.description: Actor Govinda has responded to the recent viral videos of his wife, Sunita Ahuja, where she appears to use inappropriate language towards him. In a candid conversation, he expressed surprise at the clips but emphasized that he holds no anger, viewing such incidents as part of their personal life. Govinda reassured friends who reached out to him, stating there was no cause for concern. His comments have sparked varied reactions on social media, with some praising his composure while others share their opinions on the situation. As of now, no further official statements have been made by the couple.

results.title: Gurugram gets state of the art Tower of Justice CJI Justice Surya Kant inaugurate it
results.description: भारत के मुख्य न्यायाधीश जस्टिस सूर्यकांत ने गुरुग्राम में अत्याधुनिक 'टावर ऑफ जस्टिस' का लोकार्पण किया है.

results.title: Lock Upp 2: Riteish Deshmukh Loses His Cool At Yogesh Rawat, Says, 'Don't Put This Act With Me'
results.description: A new Lock Upp 2 promo shows Riteish Deshmukh losing his cool at Yogesh Rawat during a task, telling him, "Don't put this act with me," during a heated argument.

results.title: RSS expresses 'grief' over donation theft in Ayodhya Ram temple
results.description: Ayodhya Ram Temple: The RSS expressed grief over alleged irregularities in donation counting and said it was confident the SIT probe and police investigation would reach a decisive conclusion. Eight people have been arrested so far.

results.title: Govt Calls All-Party Meeting On July 19 Ahead Of Monsoon Session; Opposition Set To Raise Key Issues
results.description: The Centre is expected to present its legislative agenda at the meeting, while opposition parties are likely to flag issues including the NEET-UG paper leak, Operation Sindoor and recent political developments.

results.title: Ayodhya Ram temple trust to define CEO’s powers: Nripendra Mishra
results.description: Ram Temple Construction Committee Chairman Nripendra Mishra said the Ayodhya temple trust will decide the powers and responsibilities of its first CEO. He said the CEO will oversee financial management and devotee services while functioning without government interference under the trust's supervision

results.title: Extended service hours at Mangaluru Head Post Office from July 13
results.description: India Post: Mangaluru Head Post Office will offer extended services from 8 am to 8 pm from July 13, including Aadhaar, Speed Post, parcel booking, savings schemes and Sunday facilities for customers.
